description: Create a new branch from main and set up the working environment
steps: Switch to main branch: git checkout main
Create and checkout new branch: git checkout -b docs/api-contract-and-sync
Run npm ci to install dependencies
Verify lint passes on the existing codebase: npm run lint:css
acceptance_criteria: On branch docs/api-contract-and-sync branched from main
findings: Pre-commit hook runs build (bundle.js) and lint automatically. npm ci installs cleanly. Lint passes on main with no issues. Branch created from main (commit 5e41399 Merge pull request #103).
